issue_title: In SignalR demo issue with userId when uploading files
issue_body_preview:
I was checking SignalR demo and uploaded files to someone in chat room. once i uploaded file to one user and then uploaded file to other user, but file sent to same user whom i sent before.
Maybe i have changed the focus, or on upload button userId is not changing. I haven't debugged yet. Maybe thi
test_description_zh: 在 SignalR 聊天演示中，打开与用户A的聊天窗口并上传一个文件发送给用户A，然后切换到与用户B的聊天窗口并再次上传一个文件，观察文件是否发送给了正确的用户B。
expected_result_zh: 切换聊天窗口后上传文件，文件应正确发送给当前聊天窗口对应的用户（用户B），而不是之前聊天的用户（用户A）。每次上传文件时，接收者应与当前活跃的聊天窗口一致。
